patch.value: Adopt current pm SDK and TypeScript 7 toolchain

Consolidate the five overlapping pm-github dependency updates, synchronize package and manifest compatibility contracts, keep npm build artifacts out of Git, and validate every GitHub importer/exporter/search/hook registration against pm CLI 2026.7.10.

pm CLI SDK/changelog, TypeScript, Node types, and checkout action are current; package peer/dev and manifest minimums agree on 2026.7.10; generated dist is published but untracked; full release and real installed-extension gates pass with zero vulnerabilities and no private data.
Current origin/main contains Dependabot configuration and the five update PRs are independently green.

author: codex
message: Consolidating current SDK/toolchain updates in isolated worktree

author: codex
message: Consolidating current SDK/toolchain updates in isolated worktree

author: codex

value.note: SDK-native importer/exporter metadata without duplicate commands
Registration contract and manifest capability regression coverage
Generated dist excluded from Git history

patch.value: Consolidated current dependency updates, synchronized pm 2026.7.10 peer/dev/manifest contracts, migrated importer/exporter help metadata to the SDK-native registration options, removed invalid manifest capability and duplicate explicit commands, updated checkout v7, and untracked generated dist.
Latest pm-github activates every intended command, field, importer, exporter, search provider, hook, and preflight without SDK capability or handler-collision warnings.

TypeScript 7 build and all 52 tests pass; zero production vulnerabilities; isolated latest-pm package doctor reports zero warnings with 5 commands, 36 flags, 6 item fields, 1 importer, 1 exporter, 1 search provider, 1 after-command hook, and 1 preflight; github help exposes import/export/sync/validate.

value.author: codex
value.text: registerImporter and registerExporter accept first-class command metadata in the current SDK; duplicating the derived commands causes self-collisions and loses the clean native integration contract.

message: Validated warning-free full SDK activation under latest pm

patch.value: Current toolchain and full SDK integration pass release and installed-extension gates
